events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 92: Quick Modular Update for Sauces and Condiments
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: A week 14 quick modular is being implemented for Sauces and Condiments. This will address minor opportunities, late developing new items, brand flow and overall assortment cleanup.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 92: The Great American Grill Out – Celebrating America's Birthday
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 92: To celebrate America's 250th birthday, stores will have a new and improved Grilling Train. Items will include buns, Coca-Cola and Frito Lay chips along with a selection of core condiments. Many of the items are on Rollback and will be a featured through May and June.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 95: The Grilling Train Will Include a 1/2 Pallet of Frito Lay Chips
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: As part of the America 250th celebration, the grilling train will include a half-pallet of party size potato chips from Frito Lay. It is the responsibility of the Frito Lay representative to keep this half-pallet maintained for the duration of this program.

events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: This AMP message announces the winners of the Friendliest Front End Spring Edition.
